content.dsl:
control flow do
  manipulate :a5, { :label => "Init Fen and Dispose" }, <<-END
    data.old_fen = \"rnbqkbnr/pppppppp/8/8/8/8/PPPPPPPP/RNBQKBNR w KQkq - 0 1\"
    data.dispose = [-1,0]
    data.problem = false
    data.game_over = false
  END
  call :a19, :frames_init, parameters: { :label => "UI Init", :arguments => [⭐(:name => :style_url, :value => "https://cpee.org/form/frames.css" ), ⭐(:name => :document_url, :value => nil ), ⭐(:name => :x_amount, :value => "5" ), ⭐(:name => :y_amount, :value => "8" ), ⭐(:name => :lang, :value => "de-at" ), ⭐(:name => :document_name, :value => "Show Info" )], :annotations => { :_timing => {:_timing_weight => nil, :_timing_avg => nil, :_context_data_analysis => {:probes => nil, :ips => nil}, :report => [{ :url => nil }], :explanations => nil}, :_notes => {:_notes_general => nil} } }
  call :a18, :frames_display, parameters: { :label => "UI Clear", :arguments => [⭐(:name => :type, :value => "set" ), ⭐(:name => :lx, :value => "0" ), ⭐(:name => :ly, :value => "0" ), ⭐(:name => :x_amount, :value => "5" ), ⭐(:name => :y_amount, :value => "8" ), ⭐(:name => :button, :value => nil ), ⭐(:name => :style, :value => nil ), ⭐(:name => :urls, :value => nil ), ⭐(:name => :default, :value => nil )], :annotations => { :_generic => nil, :_timing => {:_timing_weight => nil, :_timing_avg => nil, :explanations => nil}, :_shifting => {:_shifting_type => "Duration"}, :_context_data_analysis => {:probes => nil, :ips => nil}, :report => {:url => nil}, :_notes => {:_notes_general => nil} } }
  call :a17, :frames_display, parameters: { :label => "UI Show  Header", :arguments => [⭐(:name => :type, :value => "set" ), ⭐(:name => :lx, :value => "0" ), ⭐(:name => :ly, :value => "0" ), ⭐(:name => :x_amount, :value => "5" ), ⭐(:name => :y_amount, :value => "1" ), ⭐(:name => :button, :value => nil ), ⭐(:name => :style, :value => nil ), ⭐(:name => :urls, :value => [ { "lang": "de-at", "url": "https://cpee.org/form/tum-header.html" } ] ), ⭐(:name => :default, :value => { "name": "Fingerquetscher 3000" } )], :annotations => { :_timing => {:_timing_weight => nil, :_timing_avg => nil, :_context_data_analysis => {:probes => nil, :ips => nil}, :report => [{ :url => nil }], :explanations => nil}, :_notes => {:_notes_general => nil} } }
  call :a14, :frames_display, parameters: { :label => "UI Display Board", :arguments => [⭐(:name => :type, :value => "set" ), ⭐(:name => :lx, :value => "3" ), ⭐(:name => :ly, :value => "1" ), ⭐(:name => :x_amount, :value => "2" ), ⭐(:name => :y_amount, :value => "5" ), ⭐(:name => :button, :value => nil ), ⭐(:name => :style, :value => nil ), ⭐(:name => :urls, :value => [ { "lang": "de-at", "url": "https://cpee.org/form/board.html" } ] ), ⭐(:name => :default, :value => { "fen": 🠊("data.old_fen") } )], :annotations => { :_timing => {:_timing_weight => nil, :_timing_avg => nil, :_context_data_analysis => {:probes => nil, :ips => nil}, :report => [{ :url => nil }], :explanations => nil}, :_notes => {:_notes_general => nil} } }
  call :a21, :frames_display, parameters: { :label => "UI Display Process", :arguments => [⭐(:name => :type, :value => "set" ), ⭐(:name => :lx, :value => "0" ), ⭐(:name => :ly, :value => "1" ), ⭐(:name => :x_amount, :value => "3" ), ⭐(:name => :y_amount, :value => "7" ), ⭐(:name => :button, :value => nil ), ⭐(:name => :style, :value => nil ), ⭐(:name => :urls, :value => [ { "lang": "de-at", "url": "https://cpee.org/flow/graph.html" } ] ), ⭐(:name => :default, :value => { "monitor": 🠊("cpee.instance_url") } )], :annotations => { :_timing => {:_timing_weight => nil, :_timing_avg => nil, :explanations => nil}, :_shifting => {:_shifting_type => "Duration"}, :_context_data_analysis => {:probes => nil, :ips => nil}, :report => {:url => nil}, :_notes => {:_notes_general => nil} } }
  call :a7, :overview, parameters: { :label => "Robot Move overview", :method => :put, :arguments => nil, :annotations => { :_timing => {:_timing_weight => nil, :_timing_avg => nil, :explanations => nil}, :_shifting => {:_shifting_type => "Duration"}, :_context_data_analysis => {:probes => nil, :ips => nil}, :report => {:url => nil}, :_notes => {:_notes_general => nil} } }
  loop pre_test("!data.game_over") do
    call :a22, :frames_display, parameters: { :label => "UI User Move", :arguments => [⭐(:name => :type, :value => "set" ), ⭐(:name => :lx, :value => "3" ), ⭐(:name => :ly, :value => "6" ), ⭐(:name => :x_amount, :value => "2" ), ⭐(:name => :y_amount, :value => "2" ), ⭐(:name => :button, :value => nil ), ⭐(:name => :style, :value => nil ), ⭐(:name => :urls, :value => [ { "lang": "de-at", "url": "https://cpee.org/form/text.html" } ] ), ⭐(:name => :default, :value => { "text": "Please make your move and press the red button.", "style": "normal" } )], :annotations => { :_timing => {:_timing_weight => nil, :_timing_avg => nil, :_context_data_analysis => {:probes => nil, :ips => nil}, :report => [{ :url => nil }], :explanations => nil}, :_notes => {:_notes_general => nil} } }
    loop post_test("data.problem") do
      call :a12, :button, parameters: { :label => "Wait For Button Press", :method => :get, :arguments => nil, :annotations => { :_timing => {:_timing_weight => nil, :_timing_avg => nil, :_context_data_analysis => {:probes => nil, :ips => nil}, :report => [{ :url => nil }], :explanations => nil}, :_notes => {:_notes_general => nil} } }
      call :a23, :frames_display, parameters: { :label => "UI Robot Move", :arguments => [⭐(:name => :type, :value => "set" ), ⭐(:name => :lx, :value => "3" ), ⭐(:name => :ly, :value => "6" ), ⭐(:name => :x_amount, :value => "2" ), ⭐(:name => :y_amount, :value => "2" ), ⭐(:name => :button, :value => nil ), ⭐(:name => :style, :value => nil ), ⭐(:name => :urls, :value => [ { "lang": "de-at", "url": "https://cpee.org/form/text.html" } ] ), ⭐(:name => :default, :value => { "text": "Please wait for the robot to finish its move.", "style": "important" } )], :annotations => { :_timing => {:_timing_weight => nil, :_timing_avg => nil, :_context_data_analysis => {:probes => nil, :ips => nil}, :report => [{ :url => nil }], :explanations => nil}, :_notes => {:_notes_general => nil} } }
      call :a4, :subprocess, parameters: { :label => "Get Board State", :arguments => [⭐(:name => :behavior, :value => "wait_running" ), ⭐(:name => :url, :value => "https://cpee.org/hub/server/TUM-Prak-22-SS.dir/ChessboardDetection_V2.xml" ), ⭐(:name => :init, :value => nil ), ⭐(:name => :endpoints, :value => nil ), ⭐(:name => :attributes, :value => nil ), ⭐(:name => :customization, :value => nil )], :annotations => { :_timing => {:_timing_weight => nil, :_timing_avg => nil, :explanations => nil}, :_shifting => {:_shifting_type => "Duration"}, :_context_data_analysis => {:probes => nil, :ips => nil}, :report => {:url => nil}, :_notes => {:_notes_general => nil} } }, finalize: <<-END
        data.state = result['board']
      END
      call :a15, :convert_fen, parameters: { :label => "Convert To Fen", :method => :post, :arguments => [⭐(:name => :_C_body, :value => 🠊("\"application/json;\" + JSON::generate(data.fen_param)") )], :annotations => { :_timing => {:_timing_weight => nil, :_timing_avg => nil, :explanations => nil}, :_shifting => {:_shifting_type => "Duration"}, :_context_data_analysis => {:probes => nil, :ips => nil}, :report => {:url => nil}, :_notes => {:_notes_general => nil} } }, finalize: <<-END, prepare: <<-END, salvage: <<-END
        data.test = result
        data.new_fen = result['FEN']
        data.problem = result['errorstate']
        data.UIMessage = result['Message']
      END
        data.fen_param = { 
          'OldFEN' => data.old_fen, 
          'boardarray' => data.state
        }
      END
        data.problem = true
      END
      choose :exclusive do
        alternative test("data.problem") do
          call :a24, :frames_display, parameters: { :label => "UI User Reset", :arguments => [⭐(:name => :type, :value => "set" ), ⭐(:name => :lx, :value => "3" ), ⭐(:name => :ly, :value => "6" ), ⭐(:name => :x_amount, :value => "2" ), ⭐(:name => :y_amount, :value => "2" ), ⭐(:name => :button, :value => nil ), ⭐(:name => :style, :value => nil ), ⭐(:name => :urls, :value => [ { "lang": "de-at", "url": "https://cpee.org/form/text.html" } ] ), ⭐(:name => :default, :value => { "text": "Wrong move. Go back to displayed state, make a good move, and then press the red button.", "style": "normal" } )], :annotations => { :_timing => {:_timing_weight => nil, :_timing_avg => nil, :_context_data_analysis => {:probes => nil, :ips => nil}, :report => [{ :url => nil }], :explanations => nil}, :_notes => {:_notes_general => nil} } }
        end
      end
    end
    call :a8, :best_move, parameters: { :label => "Computer Move", :method => :post, :arguments => [⭐(:name => :_C_body, :value => 🠊("\"application/json;\" + JSON::generate(data.fen_param)") )], :annotations => { :_generic => nil, :_timing => {:_timing_weight => nil, :_timing_avg => nil, :explanations => nil}, :_shifting => {:_shifting_type => "Duration"}, :_context_data_analysis => {:probes => nil, :ips => nil}, :report => {:url => nil}, :_notes => {:_notes_general => nil} } }, finalize: <<-END, prepare: <<-END
      data.test = result
      data.move = result['Move']
      data.move_type = result['MoveType']
      data.old_fen = result['NewFEN']
      data.UiMessage = result['GameState']
      data.game_over = result['GameEnded']
    END
      data.fen_param = { 
        'FEN' => data.new_fen,
        'skill' => 10
      }
    END
    choose :exclusive do
      alternative test("data.game_over") do
        call :a6, :frames_display, parameters: { :label => "", :arguments => [⭐(:name => :type, :value => "set" ), ⭐(:name => :lx, :value => "3" ), ⭐(:name => :ly, :value => "6" ), ⭐(:name => :x_amount, :value => "2" ), ⭐(:name => :y_amount, :value => "2" ), ⭐(:name => :button, :value => nil ), ⭐(:name => :style, :value => nil ), ⭐(:name => :urls, :value => [ { "lang": "de-at", "url": "https://cpee.org/form/text.html" } ] ), ⭐(:name => :default, :value => { "text": "Game is Over", "style": "normal" } )], :annotations => { :_timing => {:_timing_weight => nil, :_timing_avg => nil, :explanations => nil}, :_shifting => {:_shifting_type => "Duration"}, :_context_data_analysis => {:probes => nil, :ips => nil}, :report => {:url => nil}, :_notes => {:_notes_general => nil} } }
      end
    end
    call :a20, :frames_display, parameters: { :label => "UI Display Board", :arguments => [⭐(:name => :type, :value => "set" ), ⭐(:name => :lx, :value => "3" ), ⭐(:name => :ly, :value => "1" ), ⭐(:name => :x_amount, :value => "2" ), ⭐(:name => :y_amount, :value => "5" ), ⭐(:name => :button, :value => nil ), ⭐(:name => :style, :value => nil ), ⭐(:name => :urls, :value => [ { "lang": "de-at", "url": "https://cpee.org/form/board.html" } ] ), ⭐(:name => :default, :value => { "fen": 🠊("data.old_fen") } )], :annotations => { :_timing => {:_timing_weight => nil, :_timing_avg => nil, :_context_data_analysis => {:probes => nil, :ips => nil}, :report => [{ :url => nil }], :explanations => nil}, :_notes => {:_notes_general => nil} } }
    choose :exclusive do
      alternative test("data.move_type == \"en_passant\"") do
        stop :a1
      end
      alternative test("data.move_type == \"kingside_castle\"") do
        call :a2, :castle_king, parameters: { :label => "Robot Castle K", :method => :put, :arguments => nil, :annotations => { :_timing => {:_timing_weight => nil, :_timing_avg => nil, :explanations => nil}, :_shifting => {:_shifting_type => "Duration"}, :_context_data_analysis => {:probes => nil, :ips => nil}, :report => {:url => nil}, :_notes => {:_notes_general => nil} } }
      end
      alternative test("data.move_type == \"queenside_castle\"") do
        call :a10, :castle_queen, parameters: { :label => "Robot Castle Q", :method => :put, :arguments => nil, :annotations => { :_timing => {:_timing_weight => nil, :_timing_avg => nil, :explanations => nil}, :_shifting => {:_shifting_type => "Duration"}, :_context_data_analysis => {:probes => nil, :ips => nil}, :report => {:url => nil}, :_notes => {:_notes_general => nil} } }
      end
      alternative test("data.move_type == \"direct capture\"") do
        call :a11, :subprocess, parameters: { :label => "Robot Capture", :arguments => [⭐(:name => :behavior, :value => "wait_running" ), ⭐(:name => :url, :value => "https://cpee.org/hub/server/TUM-Prak-22-SS.dir/Capture_V1.xml" ), ⭐(:name => :init, :value => { "move": 🠊("data.move"), "move_to_x": 🠊("data.dispose[0]"), "move_to_y": 🠊("data.dispose[1]") } ), ⭐(:name => :endpoints, :value => nil ), ⭐(:name => :attributes, :value => nil ), ⭐(:name => :customization, :value => nil )], :annotations => { :_generic => nil, :_timing => {:_timing_weight => nil, :_timing_avg => nil, :explanations => nil}, :_shifting => {:_shifting_type => "Duration"}, :_context_data_analysis => {:probes => nil, :ips => nil}, :report => {:url => nil}, :_notes => {:_notes_general => nil} } }, finalize: <<-END
          data.dispose[1] += 1
          if data.dispose[1] > 7
            data.dispose[0] -= 1
            data.dispose[1] = 0
        END
      end
      otherwise  do
        call :a9, :subprocess, parameters: { :label => "Robot Reposition", :arguments => [⭐(:name => :behavior, :value => "wait_running" ), ⭐(:name => :url, :value => "https://cpee.org/hub/server/TUM-Prak-22-SS.dir/Repositon_V2.xml" ), ⭐(:name => :init, :value => { "move": 🠊("data.move") } ), ⭐(:name => :endpoints, :value => nil ), ⭐(:name => :attributes, :value => nil ), ⭐(:name => :customization, :value => nil )], :annotations => { :_timing => {:_timing_weight => nil, :_timing_avg => nil, :explanations => nil}, :_shifting => {:_shifting_type => "Duration"}, :_context_data_analysis => {:probes => nil, :ips => nil}, :report => {:url => nil}, :_notes => {:_notes_general => nil} } }
      end
    end
    manipulate :a25, { :label => "" }
  end
end
